notes: PLAT.TIKTOK_HOOK_3S_MISSING + PLAT.TIKTOK_COVER_FRAME_MISSING. TikTok is out of v1 for publishing (RD-7, documented manual path) but the platform gate ships. The clean package declares first_3s_hook_pass + cover_frame_timestamp in the audit_header (the gate's hasField reads header keys). Video packages need a temp CONTENT_HOME for the cooldown lookup (empty ⇒ clean).

cases.name: missing-hook-and-cover
cases.notes: Neither the first-3s hook field nor the cover-frame field is present (order-stable: hook before cover, per the gate).
